---
pagetitle: "Nidhi Jain — Economist"
---

```{=html}
<section class="es-hero">
  <div class="es-hero-grid">
    <div>
      <div class="es-eyebrow es-reveal es-d1">Economist · Microeconomic Theory</div>
      <h1 class="es-name es-reveal es-d1">Nidhi <em>Jain</em></h1>
      <p class="es-tagline es-reveal es-d2">I study how <span class="hl">information, media, and incentives</span> shape political and market outcomes.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="es-motif es-reveal es-d3" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 420 300" fill="none" stroke="#8E2433">
        <g stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.9">
          <line x1="60" y1="150" x2="180" y2="70"/>
          <line x1="60" y1="150" x2="180" y2="230"/>
          <line x1="180" y1="70" x2="320" y2="35"/>
          <line x1="180" y1="70" x2="320" y2="105"/>
          <line x1="180" y1="230" x2="320" y2="195"/>
          <line x1="180" y1="230" x2="320" y2="265"/>
        </g>
        <g fill="#F4F0E7" stroke="#8E2433" stroke-width="1.6">
          <circle cx="60" cy="150" r="9"/>
          <circle cx="180" cy="70" r="7"/>
          <circle cx="180" cy="230" r="7"/>
        </g>
        <g fill="#8E2433" stroke="none">
          <rect x="313" y="28" width="14" height="14"/>
          <rect x="313" y="98" width="14" height="14"/>
          <rect x="313" y="188" width="14" height="14"/>
          <rect x="313" y="258" width="14" height="14"/>
        </g>
        <text class="lbl" x="40" y="180">player 1</text>
        <text class="lbl" x="150" y="55">player 2</text>
        <text class="lbl" x="338" y="40">payoff</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="es-rule">

<section class="es-about">
  <div class="es-sec-label">About</div>
  <div>
    <p>I am an economist working in <strong>microeconomic theory</strong>, <strong>political economy</strong>, and <strong>information economics</strong>. I completed my PhD at Shiv Nadar University in 2024 and currently support Microeconomics courses at New York University Abu Dhabi by conducting recitation sessions and providing academic support.</p>
    <p>My research asks how the way information is produced and shared &mdash; through the media, elections, and markets &mdash; changes the choices that people and institutions make. </p>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="es-rule">

<section class="es-work">
  <div class="es-work-head">
    <h2>Selected work</h2>
    <a class="es-more" href="research.html">All research &rarr;</a>
  </div>

  <div class="es-paper">
    <div class="yr">2023</div>
    <div>
      <div class="ttl">Responsive democracy and commercial media</div>
      <div class="meta">with Saptarshi P. Ghosh, C&eacute;sar Martinelli &amp; Jaideep Roy</div>
    </div>
    <span class="venue">Economics Letters</span>
  </div>

  <div class="es-paper">
    <div class="yr">w.p.</div>
    <div>
      <div class="ttl">Ideological advantage and political misfortune</div>
      <div class="meta">with Saptarshi P. Ghosh, C&eacute;sar Martinelli &amp; Jaideep Roy</div>
    </div>
    <span class="venue wp">Working paper</span>
  </div>

  <div class="es-paper">
    <div class="yr">w.p.</div>
    <div>
      <div class="ttl">Timing of the Tie-Breaker</div>
      <div class="meta">with Sumit Goel &amp; Amit Goyal</div>
    </div>
    <span class="venue wp">Working paper</span>
  </div>

  <div class="es-paper">
    <div class="yr">w.p.</div>
    <div>
      <div class="ttl">Brand Ambassadors: Bundling versus Unbundling</div>
      <div class="meta">with Saptarshi P. Ghosh</div>
    </div>
    <span class="venue wp">Working paper</span>
  </div>
</section>
```

::::: {.es-eq-note}
[A favourite curve]{.k}

:::: {.es-eq-flex}
::: {.es-eq-text}
The lemniscate of Bernoulli:

$$2\left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right)^{2}=25\left(x^{2}-y^{2}\right)$$
:::

::: {.es-eq-graph}
```{=html}
<svg viewBox="0 0 320 170" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true">
  <g stroke="rgba(27,22,19,.18)" stroke-width="1">
    <line x1="14" y1="85.0" x2="306" y2="85.0"/>
    <line x1="160.0" y1="14" x2="160.0" y2="156"/>
  </g>
  <path d="M160.00 85.00 L171.56 96.41 L176.46 101.03 L180.28 104.50 L183.56 107.36 L186.51 109.82 L189.21 112.00 L191.73 113.95 L194.12 115.72 L196.39 117.34 L198.57 118.83 L200.67 120.20 L202.71 121.48 L204.68 122.66 L206.61 123.76 L208.48 124.79 L210.32 125.75 L212.12 126.64 L213.88 127.48 L215.61 128.25 L217.31 128.98 L218.99 129.65 L220.64 130.28 L222.26 130.86 L223.86 131.40 L225.44 131.89 L227.00 132.35 L228.54 132.77 L230.06 133.15 L231.56 133.49 L233.04 133.80 L234.50 134.08 L235.95 134.32 L237.38 134.54 L238.80 134.72 L240.20 134.87 L241.58 134.99 L242.95 135.09 L244.30 135.15 L245.64 135.19 L246.96 135.20 L248.26 135.19 L249.56 135.15 L250.83 135.09 L252.10 135.00 L253.34 134.89 L254.58 134.76 L255.80 134.60 L257.00 134.42 L258.19 134.22 L259.37 134.00 L260.53 133.76 L261.67 133.50 L262.81 133.21 L263.92 132.91 L265.03 132.59 L266.11 132.25 L267.19 131.88 L268.25 131.51 L269.29 131.11 L270.32 130.70 L271.33 130.26 L272.33 129.82 L273.31 129.35 L274.28 128.87 L275.23 128.37 L276.17 127.86 L277.09 127.33 L278.00 126.79 L278.89 126.23 L279.77 125.66 L280.63 125.07 L281.47 124.47 L282.30 123.85 L283.11 123.23 L283.91 122.59 L284.69 121.93 L285.45 121.27 L286.20 120.59 L286.93 119.90 L287.64 119.20 L288.34 118.49 L289.02 117.77 L289.69 117.03 L290.33 116.29 L290.97 115.54 L291.58 114.77 L292.18 114.00 L292.76 113.22 L293.32 112.43 L293.87 111.63 L294.39 110.82 L294.91 110.00 L295.40 109.18 L295.88 108.35 L296.34 107.51 L296.78 106.66 L297.20 105.81 L297.61 104.95 L298.00 104.09 L298.37 103.22 L298.72 102.34 L299.05 101.46 L299.37 100.57 L299.67 99.68 L299.95 98.78 L300.22 97.88 L300.46 96.98 L300.69 96.07 L300.90 95.16 L301.09 94.25 L301.26 93.33 L301.42 92.41 L301.55 91.49 L301.67 90.57 L301.77 89.64 L301.85 88.71 L301.92 87.79 L301.96 86.86 L301.99 85.93 L302.00 85.00 L301.99 84.07 L301.96 83.14 L301.92 82.21 L301.85 81.29 L301.77 80.36 L301.67 79.43 L301.55 78.51 L301.42 77.59 L301.26 76.67 L301.09 75.75 L300.90 74.84 L300.69 73.93 L300.46 73.02 L300.22 72.12 L299.95 71.22 L299.67 70.32 L299.37 69.43 L299.05 68.54 L298.72 67.66 L298.37 66.78 L298.00 65.91 L297.61 65.05 L297.20 64.19 L296.78 63.34 L296.34 62.49 L295.88 61.65 L295.40 60.82 L294.91 60.00 L294.39 59.18 L293.87 58.37 L293.32 57.57 L292.76 56.78 L292.18 56.00 L291.58 55.23 L290.97 54.46 L290.33 53.71 L289.69 52.97 L289.02 52.23 L288.34 51.51 L287.64 50.80 L286.93 50.10 L286.20 49.41 L285.45 48.73 L284.69 48.07 L283.91 47.41 L283.11 46.77 L282.30 46.15 L281.47 45.53 L280.63 44.93 L279.77 44.34 L278.89 43.77 L278.00 43.21 L277.09 42.67 L276.17 42.14 L275.23 41.63 L274.28 41.13 L273.31 40.65 L272.33 40.18 L271.33 39.74 L270.32 39.30 L269.29 38.89 L268.25 38.49 L267.19 38.12 L266.11 37.75 L265.03 37.41 L263.92 37.09 L262.81 36.79 L261.67 36.50 L260.53 36.24 L259.37 36.00 L258.19 35.78 L257.00 35.58 L255.80 35.40 L254.58 35.24 L253.34 35.11 L252.10 35.00 L250.83 34.91 L249.56 34.85 L248.26 34.81 L246.96 34.80 L245.64 34.81 L244.30 34.85 L242.95 34.91 L241.58 35.01 L240.20 35.13 L238.80 35.28 L237.38 35.46 L235.95 35.68 L234.50 35.92 L233.04 36.20 L231.56 36.51 L230.06 36.85 L228.54 37.23 L227.00 37.65 L225.44 38.11 L223.86 38.60 L222.26 39.14 L220.64 39.72 L218.99 40.35 L217.31 41.02 L215.61 41.75 L213.88 42.52 L212.12 43.36 L210.32 44.25 L208.48 45.21 L206.61 46.24 L204.68 47.34 L202.71 48.52 L200.67 49.80 L198.57 51.17 L196.39 52.66 L194.12 54.28 L191.73 56.05 L189.21 58.00 L186.51 60.18 L183.56 62.64 L180.28 65.50 L176.46 68.97 L171.56 73.59 L160.00 85.00 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8E2433" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  <path d="M160.00 85.00 L148.44 73.59 L143.54 68.97 L139.72 65.50 L136.44 62.64 L133.49 60.18 L130.79 58.00 L128.27 56.05 L125.88 54.28 L123.61 52.66 L121.43 51.17 L119.33 49.80 L117.29 48.52 L115.32 47.34 L113.39 46.24 L111.52 45.21 L109.68 44.25 L107.88 43.36 L106.12 42.52 L104.39 41.75 L102.69 41.02 L101.01 40.35 L99.36 39.72 L97.74 39.14 L96.14 38.60 L94.56 38.11 L93.00 37.65 L91.46 37.23 L89.94 36.85 L88.44 36.51 L86.96 36.20 L85.50 35.92 L84.05 35.68 L82.62 35.46 L81.20 35.28 L79.80 35.13 L78.42 35.01 L77.05 34.91 L75.70 34.85 L74.36 34.81 L73.04 34.80 L71.74 34.81 L70.44 34.85 L69.17 34.91 L67.90 35.00 L66.66 35.11 L65.42 35.24 L64.20 35.40 L63.00 35.58 L61.81 35.78 L60.63 36.00 L59.47 36.24 L58.33 36.50 L57.19 36.79 L56.08 37.09 L54.97 37.41 L53.89 37.75 L52.81 38.12 L51.75 38.49 L50.71 38.89 L49.68 39.30 L48.67 39.74 L47.67 40.18 L46.69 40.65 L45.72 41.13 L44.77 41.63 L43.83 42.14 L42.91 42.67 L42.00 43.21 L41.11 43.77 L40.23 44.34 L39.37 44.93 L38.53 45.53 L37.70 46.15 L36.89 46.77 L36.09 47.41 L35.31 48.07 L34.55 48.73 L33.80 49.41 L33.07 50.10 L32.36 50.80 L31.66 51.51 L30.98 52.23 L30.31 52.97 L29.67 53.71 L29.03 54.46 L28.42 55.23 L27.82 56.00 L27.24 56.78 L26.68 57.57 L26.13 58.37 L25.61 59.18 L25.09 60.00 L24.60 60.82 L24.12 61.65 L23.66 62.49 L23.22 63.34 L22.80 64.19 L22.39 65.05 L22.00 65.91 L21.63 66.78 L21.28 67.66 L20.95 68.54 L20.63 69.43 L20.33 70.32 L20.05 71.22 L19.78 72.12 L19.54 73.02 L19.31 73.93 L19.10 74.84 L18.91 75.75 L18.74 76.67 L18.58 77.59 L18.45 78.51 L18.33 79.43 L18.23 80.36 L18.15 81.29 L18.08 82.21 L18.04 83.14 L18.01 84.07 L18.00 85.00 L18.01 85.93 L18.04 86.86 L18.08 87.79 L18.15 88.71 L18.23 89.64 L18.33 90.57 L18.45 91.49 L18.58 92.41 L18.74 93.33 L18.91 94.25 L19.10 95.16 L19.31 96.07 L19.54 96.98 L19.78 97.88 L20.05 98.78 L20.33 99.68 L20.63 100.57 L20.95 101.46 L21.28 102.34 L21.63 103.22 L22.00 104.09 L22.39 104.95 L22.80 105.81 L23.22 106.66 L23.66 107.51 L24.12 108.35 L24.60 109.18 L25.09 110.00 L25.61 110.82 L26.13 111.63 L26.68 112.43 L27.24 113.22 L27.82 114.00 L28.42 114.77 L29.03 115.54 L29.67 116.29 L30.31 117.03 L30.98 117.77 L31.66 118.49 L32.36 119.20 L33.07 119.90 L33.80 120.59 L34.55 121.27 L35.31 121.93 L36.09 122.59 L36.89 123.23 L37.70 123.85 L38.53 124.47 L39.37 125.07 L40.23 125.66 L41.11 126.23 L42.00 126.79 L42.91 127.33 L43.83 127.86 L44.77 128.37 L45.72 128.87 L46.69 129.35 L47.67 129.82 L48.67 130.26 L49.68 130.70 L50.71 131.11 L51.75 131.51 L52.81 131.88 L53.89 132.25 L54.97 132.59 L56.08 132.91 L57.19 133.21 L58.33 133.50 L59.47 133.76 L60.63 134.00 L61.81 134.22 L63.00 134.42 L64.20 134.60 L65.42 134.76 L66.66 134.89 L67.90 135.00 L69.17 135.09 L70.44 135.15 L71.74 135.19 L73.04 135.20 L74.36 135.19 L75.70 135.15 L77.05 135.09 L78.42 134.99 L79.80 134.87 L81.20 134.72 L82.62 134.54 L84.05 134.32 L85.50 134.08 L86.96 133.80 L88.44 133.49 L89.94 133.15 L91.46 132.77 L93.00 132.35 L94.56 131.89 L96.14 131.40 L97.74 130.86 L99.36 130.28 L101.01 129.65 L102.69 128.98 L104.39 128.25 L106.12 127.48 L107.88 126.64 L109.68 125.75 L111.52 124.79 L113.39 123.76 L115.32 122.66 L117.29 121.48 L119.33 120.20 L121.43 118.83 L123.61 117.34 L125.88 115.72 L128.27 113.95 L130.79 112.00 L133.49 109.82 L136.44 107.36 L139.72 104.50 L143.54 101.03 L148.44 96.41 L160.00 85.00 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8E2433" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
</svg>
```
:::
::::
:::::

```{=html}
<section class="es-cards">
  <a class="es-card" href="research.html">
    <span class="num">01</span>
    <span class="ct">Research</span>
    <span class="cs">Papers, working papers, and abstracts. <span class="arrow">&rarr;</span></span>
  </a>
  <a class="es-card" href="teaching.html">
    <span class="num">02</span>
    <span class="ct">Teaching</span>
    <span class="cs">Courses at NYUAD, Ashoka &amp; SNU. <span class="arrow">&rarr;</span></span>
  </a>
  <a class="es-card" href="cv.html">
    <span class="num">03</span>
    <span class="ct">CV</span>
    <span class="cs">Full curriculum vitae (PDF). <span class="arrow">&rarr;</span></span>
  </a>
  <a class="es-card" href="blog.html">
    <span class="num">04</span>
    <span class="ct">Blog</span>
    <span class="cs">Notes on theory and teaching. <span class="arrow">&rarr;</span></span>
  </a>
</section>
```
